name: seaweb
description: Agent-native search: SF hotels, attractions, restaurants. Honest, provenance-labeled results; availability checks and partner-confirmed booking requests.

interface.longDescription: Search San Francisco hotels, attractions, and restaurants with honest, provenance-labeled results. Agents send booking requests; the partner confirms and charges — SeaWeb never takes payment.
defaultPrompt: Find a hotel near Union Square for next weekend
Book a table for 2 in the Mission on Friday at 19:00
What attractions are within walking distance of the Ferry Building?
